summary: Tested 4 bug fixes for CRM Iteration 7. All 4 fixes verified working. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - likely Recharts rendering before container has dimensions

fix_1_commission_paid_date_blur_save: Backend: commission_paid_date field stores and retrieves correctly
Frontend: CaseDetail.js uses defaultValue + onBlur pattern (saves on blur not onChange)
Frontend: Commission tab shows 'Commission Paid Date' label and date input
Code Review: Lines 736-749 confirm onBlur handler with API call
fix_2_add_additional_applicant: Backend: POST /api/clients with additional_applicants array returns 201
Backend: additional_applicants stored and retrieved correctly
Frontend: 'Add Additional Applicant' button visible in Add Client form
Frontend: Button has UserPlus icon and data-testid='add-applicant-in-form-btn'
Frontend: Clicking button adds 'Applicant 2' section with Name, DOB, Email, Phone fields
fix_3_currency_display_format: Frontend: CurrencyInput component shows type=number when focused
Frontend: CurrencyInput shows type=text with £X,XXX format when blurred
Frontend: Tested Loan Amount: typed '300000' -> displayed '£300,000' after blur
Frontend: Cases list shows properly formatted values (£360,000, £5,000,000, etc.)
fix_4_expiring_soon_6_months: Backend: /api/dashboard/stats uses timedelta(days=180) for expiring_products count
Frontend: Dashboard 'Expiring Soon' section shows 'products in 6 months'
regression_case_creation: Backend: Case with loan_amount, property_value, proc_fee_total returns correct data
regression_case_deletion: Frontend: Delete buttons visible on case rows in Cases page

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Commission Paid Date uses defaultValue + onBlur pattern - prevents premature saves
GOOD: CurrencyInput component toggles between number/text type for UX
MINOR: Console warnings from Recharts about chart dimensions - not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working. (1) Commission Paid Date saves on blur via defaultValue + onBlur pattern. (2) Add Additional Applicant button in client creation form works - adds Applicant 2 section with Name/DOB/Email/Phone fields. (3) Currency fields show raw number when typing, £X,XXX format on blur using CurrencyInput component. (4) Expiring Soon section shows '6 months' label and backend uses timedelta(days=180). Case creation and deletion work correctly. Charts show console warnings about dimensions but render correctly.
